idea_text: Invoice reminder tone assistant for freelance brand designers

report.idea_text: Invoice reminder tone assistant for freelance brand designers
report.executive_summary: Freelance brand designers in reachable communities show direct pain, WTP, competitor complaints, and clear objections about sounding robotic.

evidence.title: I hate chasing invoices without sounding rude
evidence.summary: Direct pain: freelance brand designers spend Friday afternoons writing awkward invoice reminders.
evidence.quote: Every reminder has to be firm but not ruin the client relationship.
evidence.icp_segment: freelance brand designers with 5-25 recurring clients

evidence.title: Designers swap invoice follow-up scripts
evidence.summary: Reachable community: designers share reminder scripts and discuss client relationship risk.
evidence.icp_segment: freelance brand designers with recurring client retainers

wtp_evidence.title: Designer accepts paid pilot
wtp_evidence.summary: Direct WTP: a freelance brand designer accepted a $49 paid pilot for tone-aware overdue invoice reminders.
wtp_evidence.quote: I would pay $49 for a pilot if it writes reminders in my tone.
wtp_evidence.icp_segment: freelance brand designers with 5-25 recurring clients

competitor_complaints.title: Invoice tools sound robotic
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint: generic invoice reminder tools lack designer-specific tone and client relationship context.
